v1InvalidateCacheRequest.description: Request to invalidate page cache, object cache, and CDN for a WordPress site.

siteId.description: Required. The unique identifier of the site whose cache should be invalidated.

v1InvalidateCacheRequest.title: InvalidateCacheRequest

v1ListRequest.description: Request to list WordPress sites with pagination support.

cursor.description: Optional. The cursor specifying the page to return. Use the next_cursor from a previous response to paginate.

pageSize.description: Optional. The number of sites to return per page.

v1ListRequest.title: ListRequest

v1ListResponse.description: Response containing a paginated list of WordPress sites.

invalidSiteIds.description: Output only. Site IDs that could not be retrieved.

nextCursor.description: Output only. The cursor to use for the next page of results.

validSites.description: Output only. The list of valid sites for the current page.

v1ListResponse.title: ListResponse

v1Site.description: The canonical representation of a WordPress site, including configuration, domains, and status.

accountId.description: Output only. The account ID associated with this site.

activatedCount.description: Output only. The activated count of subsites for the site.

alternateDomains.description: Output only. A list of alternate domains for the site.

cdnVersion.description: Output only. The version of the CDN for the site.

dbHost.description: Output only. The IP of the CloudSQL database of the site.

dbName.description: Output only. The main database name of the site from CloudSQL.

dbPass.description: Output only. The password of the main user of the database.

dbUser.description: Output only. The main user of the database.

deactivated.description: Output only. Whether the site is deactivated.

developerModeEnabled.description: Output only. Whether developer mode is enabled.

domain.description: Output only. The primary domain of the site.

editionId.description: Output only. The edition indicator, express (has an ID) or pro.

exposeWpLogin.description: Output only. Whether the WP Login page is exposed.

gaTrackingId.description: Output only. The Google Analytics tracking ID injected into the site.

googleAnalyticsEnabled.description: Output only. Whether Google Analytics is enabled for the site.

id.description: Output only. The unique 64-character identifier of the site.

ignoreCacheHeaders.description: Output only. Whether cache headers should be ignored for the site.

isObjectCache.description: Output only. Redis object cache enable/disable status.

isPhpUpgraded.description: Output only. Whether PHP has been upgraded.

mountPath.description: Output only. The filesystem mount path where the site files are located.

multiSite.description: Output only. Whether the site is a multi-site (structured with subdomains).

objectCacheVersion.description: Output only. The version of the object cache.

partnerId.description: Output only. The partner ID that owns this site.

phpVersion.description: Deprecated. PHP version used for running the site.

siteHosting.description: Output only. The site hosting backend: "" / "wsp" (legacy) | "wpcloud" (migrated).

sitePhpVersion.description: Output only. The PHP version string for the site.

skipUpgradingHttp.description: Output only. Whether the site should skip upgrading HTTP requests to HTTPS.

stagingDbName.description: Output only. The database name for the staging instance of the site.

stagingDomain.description: Output only. The primary domain of the staging site.

stagingPhpVersion.description: Deprecated. Staging PHP version used for running the site.

stagingSitePhpVersion.description: Output only. The staging PHP version string for the site.

stagingWpDebugEnabled.description: Output only. Whether WP debug is enabled on the staging site.

subscribedCount.description: Output only. The subscribed count of subsites for the site.

subsites.description: Output only. Subsite details for multisite installations.

template.description: Output only. Whether the site is a template.

uid.description: Output only. The unique numeric identifier of the site.

userId.description: Output only. The identifier of the user performing site actions.

version.description: Output only. The version used for template sites.

wpDebugEnabled.description: Output only. Whether WP debug is enabled on the live site.

wpOption.description: Output only. The WP option value set on the site.

v1Site.title: Site

v1SubsiteInfo.description: Information about a subsite within a WordPress multisite installation.

blogId.description: Output only. The unique integer ID of the subsite.

blogName.description: Output only. The title description of the subsite added by the user.

createdAt.description: Output only. The time when the subsite was created.

lastUpdated.description: Output only. The time when the subsite was last updated.

path.description: Output only. The path of the subsite in the URL after the domain.

status.description: Output only. The status of the subsite.

v1SubsiteInfo.title: SubsiteInfo

requestBody.description: Request to list WordPress sites with pagination support.
Request to invalidate page cache, object cache, and CDN for a WordPress site.
